# AIM Foundation (Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation)

> A leading NGO in Kolkata dedicated to education, healthcare, sustainability, and community development for underprivileged communities in India.

## Core Initiatives

- [Educational Initiatives](https://aimindia.org.in/educational-initiatives): Empowering children through digital literacy, spoken English, and holistic learning.
- [Healthcare Initiatives](https://aimindia.org.in/healthcare-initiatives): Delivering medical camps, cancer screenings, and vision care to underserved regions.
- [Gender Equality](https://aimindia.org.in/gender-equality-initiative): Empowering women through skill development, health awareness, and livelihood support.
- [Sustainability](https://aimindia.org.in/sustainability-initiatives): Protecting the environment through reforestation, mangrove restoration, and community awareness.
- [Relief & Recovery](https://aimindia.org.in/relief-to-the-underprivileged): Providing immediate aid and long-term recovery support during disasters.

## Get Involved

- [Donate](https://aimindia.org.in/individual-donation): Support our mission with a one-time or monthly contribution.
- [Volunteer](https://aimindia.org.in/volunteering): Join us on the ground or virtually to make an impact.
- [Internships](https://aimindia.org.in/internship): Build your career while serving communities.
- [CSR Partnerships](https://aimindia.org.in/corporate-social-responsibility): Collaborate with us for meaningful corporate social responsibility.
